empty.title: No updates yet.
empty.description: Subscribe to get notified when new updates are published.

dialog.title: Subscribe to updates
dialog.description: Get notified when we publish new compliance updates, add subprocessors, or renew certifications.
dialog.consent: By subscribing, you agree to receive compliance updates from {{name}}. You can unsubscribe at any time.
dialog.successToast: You will be notified when new updates are published.
dialog.unsubscribeToast: You will no longer receive update notifications.
